title: Using the Action Center
description: Learn how to identify and resolve integration issues in the Action Center, including expired OAuth tokens, template sharing, and Drive folder access.

steps.narration: Sometimes AtlusDeck needs your help to resolve integration issues. Notice the action count badge in the sidebar showing three items that need your attention. Let's take a look.
The Action Center shows all issues that need your attention. Each item tells you exactly what's wrong and how to fix it. Right now there are three issues to resolve.
This first item is an expired Google connection. When your OAuth token expires, AtlusDeck can't access your Drive or Slides. Click Connect Google to re-authenticate.
This item means a template hasn't been shared with the AtlusDeck service account. Copy the service account email and share the template in Google Drive.

callout.text: Share templates with the service account email

steps.narration: A Drive access issue means AtlusDeck can't reach your configured folder. Check that the folder still exists and permissions are correct.
After resolving all three issues, let's check the results. Notice the action badge is now gone from the sidebar.
The Action Center confirms everything is clear with a green checkmark. All issues have been resolved and you're good to go.
Back on your deals dashboard, everything is running smoothly. You can always check the Action Center if a new issue appears.
